signal_points: Chart signals will auto-populate once the GitHub Actions workflow runs for the first time.
Add your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to repo secrets to enable AI-generated signals.
You can trigger the workflow manually from the Actions tab at any time.

signals.btc_price: Signal will auto-generate — add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to GitHub secrets and run the update-signals workflow.
